rankings.l2_description: Large-stake profitable trading with high win rate and long holds. Diversified across crypto, politics, and sports.

rankings.l1_description: The general population of profitable traders. Highest activity (~38 positions, ~87 trades), most diversified across all categories, moderate 9.5-hour holds, razor-thin PnL margins.
rankings.l2_description: Buys significantly more than sells with long holds. Moderate win rate but fails to exit positions profitably.
